text: WarMonitor A new Gallup poll found a record 55% of Americans say their financial situation is getting worse, with many worried about paying monthly bills and even keeping up with minimum credit card payments. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049349078597636584/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一项新的盖洛普民意调查发现，创纪录的55%的美国人表示他们的财务状况正在恶化，许多人担心支付每月的账单，甚至无法维持信用卡最低还款额。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049349078597636584/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The problem with this type of AI writing is that every sentence is supposed to be its own punchline. Everything is meant to be impactful - but that's not how writing works. Similar to storytelling, dramatic pay-offs require subtle (and at times extensive) set ups. That irritating feeling with AI writing (without human supervision) comes from the fact that every word is somehow meant to be a banger, but isn't, because writing doesn't work like that. It creates an awkward discrepancy - it's cringe. I was told once: Music is the art of silence as much as the art of sound. Works for writing too This is the most perfectly uncanny piece of AI-assisted writing I've seen--and a great tutorial on how to identify AI text. The OP is a captain! But the tell for AI isn't rhythm, wording, or fact errors. It’s that problems with *all these elements* exist equally & at once. (1/7) https://twitter.com/evefairbanks/status/2049094535603437701/photo/1 - Eve Fairbanks tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 这种AI写作的问题在于，每一句话都被设定为自己的笑点。每一句话都旨在产生冲击力——但写作并不是这样运作的。就像讲故事一样，戏剧性的回报需要微妙（有时是广泛）的铺垫。AI写作（在没有人工监督的情况下）那种令人恼火的感觉源于这样一个事实：每一个词似乎都想成为金句，但事实并非如此，因为写作不是那样运作的。它造成了一种尴尬的差异——这很令人尴尬。我曾经被告知：音乐既是声音的艺术，也是沉默的艺术。这对写作也适用。这是我见过的最完美、最离奇的AI辅助写作作品——也是关于如何识别AI文本的绝佳教程。原作者是个高手！但AI的破绽不在于节奏、措辞或事实错误。而在于*所有这些要素*的问题同时且平等地存在。(1/7) https://twitter.com/evefairbanks/status/2049094535603437701/photo/1 - Eve Fairbanks 推文

text: WarMonitor Rather than restarting airstrikes or stepping back entirely, Trump is reportedly sticking with a long-term blockade on Iran, keeping the conflict in limbo with no clear end and no real off-ramp. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 据报道，特朗普没有重启空袭，也没有完全撤出，而是坚持对伊朗实施长期封锁，使冲突处于一种没有明确终点、也没有真正退出机制的悬而未决的状态。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF says it struck Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon, including ready-to-launch rocket systems, weapons depots, and military structures used for attacks against Israeli forces. They reported killing three Hezbollah operatives and said an Israeli soldier was lightly injured after explosive drones detonated near troops operating in the area: Yesterday (Tuesday), the IDF struck a number of Hezbollah infrastructure sites in several areas in southern Lebanon, north of the Forward Defense Line. Among the targets struck: loaded and ready-to-launch launchers, weapon storage facilities, and military structures used by the Hezbollah terrorist organization to advance terror attacks against IDF soldiers and the State of Israel. In addition, IDF soldiers identified three Hezbollah terrorists who advanced a shooting attack against IDF soldiers. Following the identification, the Israeli Air Force struck and eliminated the terrorists. In a number of events throughout yesterday (Tuesday), the Hezbollah terrorist organization launched a number of explosive drones that detonated adjacent to IDF soldiers operating in southern Lebanon, south of the Forward Defense Line. As a result, an IDF soldier was lightly injured. The soldier was evacuated to a hospital for medical treatment. His family has been notified. The IDF will continue to operate against threats directed at Israeli civilians and IDF soldiers, in accordance with directives from the political echelon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，他们袭击了黎巴嫩南部的真主党基础设施，包括准备发射的火箭系统、武器仓库以及用于攻击以色列军队的军事设施。他们报告称击毙了三名真主党武装人员，并表示一名以色列士兵在附近活动的部队附近爆炸的无人机袭击中受轻伤：昨天（周二），以色列国防军袭击了黎巴嫩南部前沿防线以北几个地区的多个真主党基础设施点。被袭击的目标包括：已装填并准备发射的发射器、武器储存设施以及真主党恐怖组织用于推进针对以色列国防军士兵和以色列国的恐怖袭击的军事设施。此外，以色列国防军士兵发现了三名推进针对以色列国防军士兵射击袭击的真主党恐怖分子。在确认身份后，以色列空军进行了打击并消灭了这些恐怖分子。在昨天（周二）全天的多起事件中，真主党恐怖组织发射了多架爆炸性无人机，在黎巴嫩南部前沿防线以南活动的以色列国防军士兵附近爆炸。结果，一名以色列国防军士兵受轻伤。该士兵已被送往医院接受治疗。其家属已收到通知。以色列国防军将继续根据政治层面的指示，针对针对以色列平民和以色列国防军士兵的威胁采取行动。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index UK ambassador to the United States says that Washington's 'special relationship' is 'probably' with Israel, rather than with the UK, according to leaked comments. tweet
text_zh: 据泄露的评论显示，英国驻美国大使表示，华盛顿的“特殊关系”对象“可能”是以色列，而不是英国。推文

text: 🇺🇸 Google and the Pentagon have signed a confidential agreement in the field of artificial intelligence, according to The Information. Google has granted the Pentagon permission to use its artificial intelligence models to process confidential information and perform military tasks. Under this agreement, the United States can apply these technologies for almost any legitimate purpose, and Google has no right to block or overturn the government's decisions. Within the company, some employees have expressed their protest against this agreement 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 据《The Information》报道，谷歌与五角大楼签署了一份关于人工智能领域的保密协议。谷歌已授权五角大楼使用其人工智能模型来处理机密信息并执行军事任务。根据该协议，美国可以将这些技术应用于几乎任何合法目的，而谷歌无权阻止或推翻政府的决定。在公司内部，一些员工对该协议表示抗议 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 The Russian Ministry of Defence announced that the May 9th Parade celebrating the 81st anniversary of the Second World War won’t feature any columns of military equipment, citing current operational constraints. Instead the parade will feature foot columns from Russian military branches and education institutions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部宣布，为庆祝第二次世界大战胜利81周年的5月9日阅兵式将不会有任何军事装备方阵，理由是当前的作战限制。相反，阅兵式将由俄罗斯各军种和教育机构的徒步方阵组成。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Here's a summary of everything you need to know about the past 24 hours: ➡️ The Victory Day Parade in Moscow has not been canceled ➡️ The UAE announces their withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ ➡️ Israel and Ukraine are fighting ➡️ Bangladesh launches first power unit of the Rooppur Nuclear Power Plant — built together with Russia ➡️ The Russian Defense Ministry gives an update on the situation in Mali ➡️ Trump is talking to his imaginary Iranian friends again , and is apparently the King's cousin ➡️ Hungary's prime minister-elect Magyar meets with the mayor of Zakarpattia's Beregovo ➡️ US Navy harasses and boards a ship they suspected to be headed for Iranian ports ➡️ King Charles lobbies for a war with Russia in the US Congress ➡️ State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Reuters: A superyacht owned by Russian billionaire Alexey Mordashov was able to transit the blockaded Strait of Hormuz after undergoing maintenance in Dubai. The yacht, called Nord, sailed under a Russian flag and crossed the strait on an approved route in compliance with international maritime law. According to a source close to Mordashov, neither Iran nor the United States objected to the yacht's movement, with Iran considering it a civilian vessel of a friendly country conducting a peaceful transit and has been located near the coast of Oman since Sunday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 路透社：俄罗斯亿万富翁阿列克谢·莫尔达绍夫（Alexey Mordashov）拥有的一艘超级游艇在迪拜完成维护后，成功通过了被封锁的霍尔木兹海峡。这艘名为“Nord”的游艇悬挂俄罗斯国旗，并按照国际海事法规定的批准航线穿越了海峡。据接近莫尔达绍夫的消息人士称，伊朗和美国均未对该游艇的航行提出异议。伊朗将其视为友好国家的民用船只，认为其正在进行和平过境。自周日以来，该游艇一直位于阿曼海岸附近。 @wfwitness

Dare I say that if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049301193269125503/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 King Charles III joking some more: You recently commented, Mr. President, that if it were not for the United States, European countries would be speaking German. Dare I say that if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 King Charles III on Ukraine and NATO: American leadership helped rebuild a shattered continent, playing a decisive role as a defender of freedom in Europe . We and I shall never forget that, not least as freedom is again under attack following Russia's invasion of Ukraine. Today, our partnerships in NATO deepen our technological and military cooperation and ensure that together we can meet the challenges of an increasingly complex and contested world. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 查尔斯三世国王又开玩笑道：总统先生，您最近评论说，如果不是美国，欧洲国家现在都在说德语。我敢说，如果不是我们，您现在说的就是法语了 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 查尔斯三世国王谈乌克兰和北约：美国的领导力帮助重建了一个破碎的大陆，作为欧洲自由的捍卫者发挥了决定性作用。我们和我永远不会忘记这一点，尤其是在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，自由再次受到攻击的情况下。今天，我们在北约的伙伴关系加深了我们的技术和军事合作，并确保我们能够共同应对日益复杂和充满竞争的世界带来的挑战。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump on UK-U.S. relationship: Ours is a treasured friendship, an eternal bond, and a true story of extraordinary heroism and skill... History has known no more powerful force than the combination of American Patriotism and British Pride.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 King Charles III joking some more: You recently commented, Mr. President, that if it were not for the United States, European countries would be speaking German. I'm sorry to say that we British of course made our own small attempt at real estate redevelopment of the White House in 1814. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump on UK-U.S. relationship: Ours is a treasured friendship, an eternal bond, and a true story of extraordinary heroism and skill... History has known no more powerful force than the combination of American Patriotism and British Pride. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 查尔斯三世国王在白宫开玩笑说：我不禁注意到东翼的重新调整。我很遗憾地说，我们英国人当然在1814年对白宫进行过我们自己小规模的房地产重建尝试。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普谈英美关系：我们之间是珍贵的友谊、永恒的纽带，是一个关于非凡英雄主义和技巧的真实故事……历史上没有任何力量比美国爱国主义与英国骄傲的结合更强大。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing U.S. officials, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told his aids to prepare for an extended U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Per the report, President Trump sees pulling out of the conflict or resuming combat operations against Iran as far more risky than continuing to blockade vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports. This news follows reporting that the intelligence community was given direction to assess the risk of declaring a unilateral victory and pulling back from the conflict. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普已指示其助手为美国对霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁做好准备。据报道，特朗普总统认为，退出冲突或恢复对伊朗的作战行动，比继续封锁往返伊朗港口的船只风险要大得多。此前有报道称，情报界已接到指示，评估宣布单方面胜利并从冲突中撤出的风险。推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump is comfortable with an indefinite blockade of Iranian ports, according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，特朗普总统对无限期封锁伊朗港口感到满意。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Bunker art from US forces deployed at Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait during the Iran War. Over 210 air raid alarms were recorded. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049296746161823790/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @briana_reilly : The Pentagon is asking Congress to formally change DOD’s name to the Department of War. The push - which DOD estimates has cost ~$52 million - would require 7,600 changes to law, per a legislative proposal sent to the Hill this month. https://ogc.osd.mil/Portals/99/OLC%20Proposals/FY%202027/13Apr2026Proposals.pdf?ver=AeAXavwjNx7T4P1R3fWHSA%3d%3d H/t @TonyBertuca Pentagon seeks to codify 'Department of War' as renaming costs near $50M http://ow.ly/yT5I106xOqY - Inside Defense tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @briana_reilly：五角大楼正要求国会正式将国防部（DOD）更名为战争部。根据本月提交给国会的一项立法提案，此举（国防部估计耗资约5200万美元）将需要对法律进行7600处修改。https://ogc.osd.mil/Portals/99/OLC%20Proposals/FY%202027/13Apr2026Proposals.pdf?ver=AeAXavwjNx7T4P1R3fWHSA%3d%3d 感谢 @TonyBertuca 五角大楼寻求将“战争部”编纂入法，更名成本接近5000万美元 http://ow.ly/yT5I106xOqY - Inside Defense 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump offers a toast to “250 years of American freedom” and to the UK’s King Charles III during the White House State Dinner tonight. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049294233018810515/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普今晚在白宫国宴上为“250年的美国自由”和英国查尔斯三世国王祝酒。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049294233018810515/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @MeidasTouch : Trump cuts in front of Queen Camilla as she is shaking hands and shakes the hands of his own cabinet members https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2049289404007715051/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @MeidasTouch：特朗普在卡米拉王后握手时插到她前面，并与他自己的内阁成员握手 https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2049289404007715051/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Treasury Secretary Bessent: "Kharg Island, Iran’s primary oil export terminal, is soon nearing storage capacity, which will force the regime to reduce oil production, resulting in an additional approximately $170 million per day in lost revenue, and causing permanent damage to Iran’s oil infrastructure." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 财政部长贝森特：“伊朗主要的石油出口终端哈尔格岛即将达到存储容量上限，这将迫使该政权减少石油产量，导致每天额外损失约1.7亿美元的收入，并对伊朗的石油基础设施造成永久性损害。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says King Charles III agrees that Iran should never obtain a nuclear weapon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 King Charles III jokes about the White House: I cannot help noticing the readjustments to the East Wing. I'm sorry to say that we British of course made our own small attempt at real estate redevelopment of the White House in 1814. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，查尔斯三世国王同意伊朗绝不应获得核武器。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 查尔斯三世国王在白宫开玩笑说：我不禁注意到东翼的重新调整。我很遗憾地说，我们英国人当然在1814年对白宫进行过我们自己小规模的房地产重建尝试。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump speaking at a state dinner with King Charles III and Queen Camilla: The Declaration of Independence was a miracle for the ages that sparked a far-reaching Revolution in self-government and human freedom. But even though the political…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says King Charles III agrees that Iran should never obtain a nuclear weapon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普在与查尔斯三世国王和卡米拉王后的国宴上发表讲话：《独立宣言》是跨越时代的奇迹，它引发了一场深远的自治与人类自由革命。但尽管政治……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，查尔斯三世国王同意伊朗绝不应获得核武器。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump speaking at a state dinner with King Charles III and Queen Camilla: The Declaration of Independence was a miracle for the ages that sparked a far-reaching Revolution in self-government and human freedom. But even though the political bonds between the United States and Great Britain were dissolved forever, they thought, on July 4th, 1776, the more powerful strands of memory, culture, and identity proved unbreakable in any conflict — and grew into a friendship unlike any other on earth. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普在与查尔斯三世国王和卡米拉王后的国宴上发表讲话：《独立宣言》是跨越时代的奇迹，它引发了一场深远的自治与人类自由革命。尽管人们认为美国与英国之间的政治纽带在1776年7月4日已永远解除，但记忆、文化和身份的更强大纽带在任何冲突中都证明是牢不可破的，并发展成了一种世间独一无二的友谊。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: President Donald Trump has instructed aides to prepare for an extended blockade of Iran, aiming to further restrict its oil exports and economic activity to pressure Tehran into concessions on its nuclear program. Officials say the move reflects a decision to continue economic pressure rather than escalate militarily or pursue a near-term deal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：唐纳德·特朗普总统已指示助手为对伊朗实施长期封锁做好准备，旨在进一步限制其石油出口和经济活动，以迫使德黑兰在核计划上做出让步。官员们表示，此举反映了继续施加经济压力，而非进行军事升级或寻求近期达成协议的决定。 @wfwitness

text: This was the funniest for me. Trump airport chocolate
text_zh: 这个对我来说最有趣。特朗普机场巧克力

text: WarMonitor RT @kaitlancollins : Former DOJ official tells me: "This might be the worst case DOJ has filed in my lifetime." Comey indicted again after the last case was dismissed by a federal judge who found that the interim US Attorney was improperly appointed. https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/politics/justice-department-indicts-ex-fbi-director-james-comey-again - Kaitlan Collins tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @kaitlancollins : 前司法部官员告诉我：“这可能是我有生以来司法部提起的最糟糕的案件。” 在上一案被联邦法官以临时美国检察官任命不当为由驳回后，科米再次被起诉。 https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/politics/justice-department-indicts-ex-fbi-director-james-comey-again - Kaitlan Collins 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. Army Soldiers conduct pre-flight checks on UH-60 Black Hawk helicopters. The UH-60 is the workhorse of the Army, logging millions of flight hours and capable of both transporting troops and sling loading cargo." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049287910491361383/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国中央司令部 (CENTCOM)：“美国陆军士兵对 UH-60 黑鹰直升机进行飞行前检查。UH-60 是陆军的主力机型，拥有数百万飞行小时，既能运送部队，也能吊挂货物。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049287910491361383/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Army Soldiers conduct pre-flight checks on UH-60 Black Hawk helicopters. The UH-60 is the workhorse of the Army, logging millions of flight hours and capable of both transporting troops and sling loading cargo. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049286814708466008/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国陆军士兵对 UH-60 黑鹰直升机进行飞行前检查。UH-60 是陆军的主力机型，拥有数百万飞行小时，既能运送部队，也能吊挂货物。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049286814708466008/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent reports that the U.S. has targeted Iran's shadow banking infrastructure, access to crypto currencies, shadow fleet, and weapons procurement networks as part of the ongoing Economic Fury. He assess that oil storage and export facilities on Kharg Island will soon be reaching storage capacity, forcing Iran to reduce oil production. This will result in Iran losing $170 million a day in revenues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国财政部长贝森特报告称，作为“经济愤怒”行动的一部分，美国已针对伊朗的影子银行基础设施、加密货币访问权限、影子船队以及武器采购网络进行了打击。他评估认为，哈尔克岛上的石油储存和出口设施很快将达到储存容量上限，迫使伊朗减少石油产量。这将导致伊朗每天损失 1.7 亿美元的收入。 @wfwitness
